description: Leading European digital healthcare platform offering video consultations with doctors, psychologists, nurses, and physiotherapists. Operates in Sweden, Norway, Germany, UK, and France. Provides integrated mental health services including therapy and psychiatric consultations through app-based platform.
key_features: Largest digital health provider in Nordics; 34+ physical clinics in Sweden; 14M+ consultations; 24/7 availability; operates across multiple European countries

description: Digital psychology platform providing online therapy and mental health services. Offers video consultations with licensed psychologists, iCBT (internet-based Cognitive Behavioral Therapy) programs, and neuropsychiatric assessments for ADHD/ADD and Autism.
services: Psychological treatments for depression, anxiety, stress
key_features: 100 SEK per session with healthcare card; 200,000+ patients treated; 80% patient improvement rate; no wait times; licensed psychologists

description: Digital healthcare provider combining telehealth with physical healthcare centers. Offers chat and video consultations within 30 minutes, psychological services, and access to 27+ healthcare centers across Sweden.
key_features: Hybrid digital-physical model; 27+ healthcare centers; 10M+ consultations; 95% patient satisfaction; chat available within 30 minutes

description: One of Sweden's first digital healthcare providers offering online medical consultations and mental health services. Provides video consultations, chat-based healthcare, and psychological support through mobile app and web platform.
key_features: Pioneer in Swedish digital health; integrated mental health services; established patient base; regulatory compliant

description: Finnish psychotherapy and mental health services provider offering both in-clinic and online therapy. One of the largest private psychotherapy providers in Finland. Notable for extensive network of therapists and psychologists across Finland.
key_features: Largest private psychotherapy provider in Finland; 200+ therapists; nationwide coverage; workplace mental health partnerships
notes: Experienced significant data breach scandal in 2020, affecting operations and reputation

description: Digital arm of Mehiläinen, Finland's largest private healthcare provider. Offers comprehensive telemedicine services including mental health consultations, therapy, and psychiatric services through digital platform OmaMehiläinen.
key_features: Largest private healthcare provider in Finland; comprehensive digital platform OmaMehiläinen; 1M+ digital users; integrated physical and digital care

description: Norwegian digital healthcare provider offering fast access to doctors and mental health professionals through app-based consultations. Provides video consultations, psychologist services, and operates physical clinics alongside digital services.
key_features: Fast appointment booking; hybrid digital-physical model; operates in Norway and expanding; focus on accessibility and convenience

description: European digital healthcare brand operating in Nordic countries, UK, France, and Germany. Rebranded from Kry in some markets while maintaining Kry brand in Nordics. Offers comprehensive mental health services including video therapy, psychiatric consultations, and digital treatment programs.
services: Video consultations with mental health professionals
key_features: Pan-European presence; operates in 5+ countries; integrated mental health services; 14M+ consultations globally; strong regulatory compliance
